meta.source: Claude Code v2.1.215 (native binary) + omac sandbox audit
meta.method: Causes taken from Anthropic's published allowlist table, corroborated against the binary's embedded hosts and a sandbox-audit run. Unlike opencode, no source repo was available (minified bundle), so attribution is host-level from the documented allowlist, not call-site.
meta.purpose: Map a Claude Code egress hostname to a human-readable 'likely cause' for the network prompt. The proxy never sees the URL (TLS), so the hostname is the only signal.

origin_values.provider: Model/auth traffic to a configured provider or gateway (Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry/LLM gateway) instead of api.anthropic.com; only when configured.
origin_values.browser: Required by a browser/viewer, NOT the CLI's own egress — documented for completeness, not shown as a CLI dial.

entries.cause: Claude API request (model inference; also the WebFetch domain-safety preflight and the fast-mode availability check)
MCP connectors from claude.ai (connector traffic proxy)
entries.notes: Enabled by default for claude.ai-authenticated users; disable via ENABLE_CLAUDEAI_MCP_SERVERS=false.

entries.cause: Native installer / auto-updater, and plugin executable downloads
entries.source: network-config: 'Plugin executable downloads; native installer and native auto-updater'
entries.notes: npm/self-managed installs do not use the native installer/auto-updater path.

entries.cause: Plugin metadata and install counts for /plugin; signed artifact uploads (falls back to api.anthropic.com if blocked)
entries.notes: Shared Google host; also the installer/auto-updater host on Claude Code versions prior to 2.1.116.

entries.source: network-config: 'Claude in Chrome extension WebSocket bridge'

entries.notes: Same host serves a completely different purpose in opencode (tree-sitter grammars) — this is why the map is harness-keyed.

entries.cause: Claude Code documentation (docs pages / docs map)
Model inference / provider auth via Amazon Bedrock, Google Vertex, Microsoft Foundry, or an LLM gateway
entries.notes: Representative entry: when a provider/gateway is configured, model + auth traffic go to Bedrock (bedrock-runtime.*.amazonaws.com + STS), Vertex (*.googleapis.com), Foundry (*.microsoftonline.com), or the gateway host instead of api.anthropic.com. Only dialed when configured.

opt_in.cause: OpenTelemetry metrics/logs export and operational telemetry
opt_in.source: network-config: 'optional operational telemetry by default'; data-usage/telemetry-services
opt_in.notes: Claude Code sends operational telemetry by default (disable via env). A Datadog intake host observed in a sandbox audit is the OTEL export configured by OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT (local/TNG env), not a Claude Code default endpoint.

not_egress.note: Required by the artifact VIEWER's browser (loads artifact content from a sandboxed subdomain), NOT by the Claude Code CLI. Documented for completeness; not a CLI dial, so not shown as a cause.
